docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF RYCE STOUGHTENBOROUGH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TONI WILLIAMS IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY STOUGHTENBOROUGH, RYCE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TONI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
